rulings.Case Title: BETTY WILLIAMS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al VS. DOES 1 THROUGH 75, INCLUSIVE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Defendant B.E. Development Corporation To Provide Further Substantive Responses To Plaintiffs Discovery, Including Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, Requests For Production, And Requests For Admission; And (2) For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, June 18, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion for an order (1) compelling defendant B.E. Development Corporation to provide further substantive responses to plaintiffs' discovery, including special interrogatories, form interrogatories, requests for production and requests for admission; and (2) for monetary sanctions is continued on the court's own motion to June 24, 2014 due to the Court's schedule and the complexity and volume of the motion. = (503/TLJ)
